title: El horror de la dama del lago
original_title: El Horror de la Dama del Lago
overview: At the end of the 19th century, an English couple arrives in an uninhabited Spanish village with the intention of inhabiting a house they have inherited. There they will meet the castle ruled by the Countess of Baltán, her daughters and a couple of scientists who are trying to end their reign of terror.
